chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.D-115 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For hearing of MA-681/2022 For hearing of main case. 13.04.2022. Mrs. Tahreem Jawahery advocate for petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, A.A.G along with Paras Mazari Assistant Director (Legal) o/b respondent No.2. = Only justification made by the petitioner’s counsel was and is that they are in search of an alternate accommodation as during this short span of time they could not find any reasonable place to shift. The request is reasonable and it is not opposed by learned A.A.G. We therefore, with the consent of all learned counsels drawn two weeks’ time to the petitioner to vacate the premises / quarter in question, failing whereof the respondents shall be at liberty to take action as they deem fit and proper. Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
